name: Honey Mustard Steaks with Grilled Onions
recipeIngredient: 4 Ribeye or strip steaks; cut into 1-inch thick
1 large Red onion; cut into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mustard, parsley, honey, cider vinegar, water, hot pepper sauce, and ground black pepper in a bowl.
2. Place steaks and onion slices on the grill over medium coals.
3. Brush both with glaze.
4. Grill for 9 to 12 minutes for rare (140°F) to medium (160°F), turning once and brushing with glaze.
